web.title: Analytics - Shopify Help Center
web.description: The Analytics page displays key sales, orders, and online store visitor data. You can use the Analytics page to determine how your store is performing.

web.title: Sales reports - Shopify Help Center
web.description: From your Shopify admin, go to Analytics > Reports . Click the Category filter. Click Sales to filter the reports to display only Sales reports. Mobile.
